channel.title: Posts on Berke Aslan
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Berke Aslan

item.title: My First Post
item.description: Hey! This will be the first post on my new website. As you have probably read on the landing page, this website will primarily be used for showcasing my ML learning notes. Next to that, I hope to publish some other posts with a heavy focus on STEM. This can be anything really: from data structures and algorithms in Python (or C), to proofs of convergence of the conjugate gradient method. Nothing is out of the ordinary.
